title: brain evidence retry <evidenceId> — --json success output
description: Synchronously re-run the deterministic reverification of `evidence resolve` and, when the target note resolves, ALSO increment the `attempts` counter in the note's `evidence:` frontmatter entry (one commit onto refs/heads/main, then re-fold). `attempts` lives in the note (vault-authoritative) — there is NO jobs queue and NO ledger event in v2 (the rendition-coupled reverify job was retired). A gone target ⇒ outcome=target-missing, attempts unchanged, no mutation. Missing evidence ⇒ not-found (exit 1).

allOf.description: outcome=resolved ⇒ status=resolved AND a canonical commit (the Markdown SSOT write, incl. the incremented attempts).
outcome=target-missing ⇒ status=needs-review, attempts unchanged, no commit.

outcome.description: resolved = target resolves, attempts incremented + status written to Markdown + committed; target-missing = the soft noteId/entry no longer resolves, no mutation.

noteId.description: The soft-referenced owning note (`(unknown)` when the row carries no noteId).

status.description: The evidence status after the retry, bound to outcome.

attempts.description: The attempts counter now recorded in the note (incremented on outcome=resolved; unchanged on target-missing).

commit.description: 40-char hex canonical commit the retry landed as. Present ONLY on outcome=resolved.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Synchronously reverify + increment attempts in the note frontmatter (one commit); a gone target is target-missing (attempts unchanged, no mutation). No jobs queue, no ledger event.

args.description: The evidence id to retry (from `brain evidence review`).

sideEffects: on outcome=resolved: increments attempts + writes status/verdict/lastCheckedAt into the note's evidence frontmatter and commits it onto refs/heads/main via the canonical mutation order, then re-folds the projection
prohibitedEffects: never enqueues a job (v2 has no async reverify)
never writes the attempts/status directly to SQLite bypassing the note-frontmatter mutation order
no run-id / ledger-seq / audit signature read or write
never mutates a gone target note

locks.when: outcome=resolved (the mutation order holds the vault lock)

errorCodes.when: the evidence id does not exist
the vault repo is missing/unreadable, HEAD is not main, or the target note is dirty
